reason: The installed CHAT/WORK adapter validates prediction objects after reasoning but does not load the bound GitHub source release into the ChatGPT session or prove that the session used it. Therefore repository-only source modifications cannot yet be credited as model learning or accuracy improvement.
allowed_work: Build project-source non-use proof and mixed-source rejection
Run byte-identical R16 repository-only shadow validation
Materialize R21 revised candidate source baseline
prohibited_claims: new source knowledge absorbed by the prediction session
repository source is the sole causal input
resume_condition: A fresh answer-isolated ChatGPT session consumes only a hash-bound repository source packet and the validator proves every evidence row resolves to that packet with no project-upload fallback.
